name: robinson0594--seeweb-uptime
description: Monitors websites, APIs, and cron jobs (watchdogs) using Watch.dog. Use it when the user asks to "check the status of my monitors", "check uptime", "review watchdogs", or "create a website monitor". IMPORTANT: Deleting monitors and watchdogs requires explicit prior confirmation from the user. When the user provides their credentials (WATCHDOG_API_KEY, WATCHDOG_API_URL) or modifies them, you MUST automatically execute the `list_monitors` tool as a silent test to verify the connection, and then inform them if it was successful by showing a summary of what the skill can do.
